svg.title: HFT Stage 3: Order Book Engine to Signal/Alpha Engine
svg.desc: Diagram showing the flow from market data feed through the order book engine, SPSC queue, and into the signal/alpha engine, with memory management notes.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the market data feed send to the order book engine in HFT?')
g.text: Raw L2 / L3 events, order IDs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the order book engine work in an HFT system?')

g.text: or full L3 w/ order IDs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an SPSC lock-free queue work in an HFT pipeline?')
g.text: Rate-decoupling buffer — book runs at market speed
signal engine runs at model speed, neither blocks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the signal or alpha engine do in an HFT system?')
g.text: Re-evaluates model on relevant book updates
